entities.description: As a subsection of 'BOOKINDEX', this section provides a high-level introduction to the proposed BookIndex, defining its hierarchical structure-aware nature and outlining its two-stage construction process (Tree Construction and Graph Construction) for capturing logical hierarchies and entity relations in complex documents.
A hierarchical structure-aware index designed to capture explicit logical hierarchy and intricate entity relations within complex documents, serving as the core subject of section 4.1.
The first stage of the BookIndex construction process, which parses document layout to establish hierarchical nodes categorized by type, detailed in section 4.1.
The second stage of the BookIndex construction process, which extracts fine-grained entity knowledge from tree nodes and refines it using gradient-based entity resolution, detailed in section 4.1.

relations.description: The concept of 'BookIndex' is the primary topic defined and introduced in section 4.1.
The method 'Tree Construction' is a key component of the overview provided in section 4.1.
The method 'Graph Construction' is a key component of the overview provided in section 4.1.
